testcase.name: testEmptyEmailFailure
testcase.system-out: Server started! [RegistrationServlet] POST first_name/last_name/email/password/DoB: brandon, dimoski, , bdim_pass, 2002-02-03 [RegistrationServlet] GET [WelcomeServlet] POST Title: fail
testcase.system-err: SLF4J(W): No SLF4J providers were found. SLF4J(W): Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J(W): See https://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#noProviders for further details. May 17, 2026 5:23:42 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find an exact match for CDP version 148, returning the closest version; found: 145; Please update to a Selenium version that supports CDP version 148
